sentence: 博物馆里展出了一具完整的鱼龙化石。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ zhǎnchū le yī jù wánzhěng de yú lóng huàshí.
english: The museum has a complete ichthyosaur fossil on display.

pinyin: Tā yòng huǒchái diǎnrán le làzhú.
english: He lit the candle with a match.

meaning: cannot bear not; be dying to
sentence: 天气这么热，我恨不得跳进游泳池。
pinyin: Tiānqì zhème rè, wǒ hèn bù dé tiào jìn yóuyǒngchí.
english: It's so hot I'm itching to jump into a swimming pool.

sentence: 这枚戒指上镶嵌着一颗钻石。
pinyin: Zhè méi jièzhi shàng xiāngqiàn zhe yī kē zuànshí.
english: This ring has a diamond set in it.

meaning: as soon as possible; at the earliest possible time
sentence: 感冒了要及早去看医生，别拖着。
pinyin: Gǎnmào le yào jí zǎo qù kàn yīshēng, bié tuō zhe.
english: If you have a cold, see a doctor as soon as possible — don't put it off.
